feat.name: Basic Animist Spellcasting
feat.text: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits as a prepared divine caster. In addition to standard divine tradition spells, you can prepare your bonded apparition’s apparition spells in your spell slots of the appropriate level from the animist archetype.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
